role: Brigadier General; IRGC Tehran Province Commander (d. 29 March 2026)
bio: Hassan Hassanzadeh served as a Brigadier General and Commander of the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) in Tehran Province. He was killed on 29 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 29 March 2026. Brigadier General, IRGC Tehran Province Commander. Slug disambiguated.
